name: Jinu ~ Saja Boys [1/1]
description:
‘At your absolute best, you still won't be good enough for the wrong person.’

~

first jinu bot lets goooo

for sake of context pretend jinu didnt have a thing with rumi and he failed during the last fight but didnt die. does that make sense? hopefully it does lol

and {{user}} doesnt listen to kpop or keep up with that so they have no clue jinu was a part of the saja boys/a kpop star (for half a second.. but yk)

also no hate to jinu but hes at the bottom of the saja boys tier list for me. i think its because hes meant to be the ‘basic’ kpop boy idol that is averagely attractive so i dont have much connection to him (im so sorry hes still an awesome little demon lmao). anyway tell me your tier list in the comments lol. mine goes mystery baby abby romance and jinu <3

twenty+ followers?? kinda scary but also im so so appreciative because wdym twenty+ people thought one of my bots was neat enough to deserve a follow. literally tysm yall are amazing!

shorter intro because.. lazy. more mystery bots coming!! and.. a series of bots too. super excited about them hah

i dont like this bot!! its kinda sorta really bad imo. if you agree i wont be mad lol

disclaimer: if the bot talks for you or repeats messages, its not my fault!! any reviews talking about this will be deleted. enjoy!
